name: B&C ID.332 Crew
summary: The B&C ID.332 Crew is a sustainable, modern classic. Its gender-neutral style, extensive size range (XS-5XL) are perfect for everyone, every day. Its soft, durable fabric and contemporary dropped shoulder design offe...
descriptionLong: The B&C ID.332 Crew is a sustainable, modern classic. Its gender-neutral style, extensive size range (XS-5XL) are perfect for everyone, every day. Its soft, durable fabric and contemporary dropped shoulder design offer both comfort and style. With its label-free neck and perfectly printable 100% cotton-face, it’s easy to customise. Combine it with the B&C ID.000 Sweatpant for a complete look. For coordinated looks for everyone, pair it with B&C ID.332 Crew /kids. Each B&C ID.332 Crew contains on average 11 post-consumer recycled PET bottles (550ml).

name: Classic Zip Hoodie
summary: Discover our new Classic Zip Hoodie – the perfect complement to our Classic Sweatshirt and Hoodie. Made from soft fleece with a modern fit and premium print surface, now featuring a fully covered front zipper for extr...
descriptionLong: Discover our new Classic Zip Hoodie – the perfect complement to our Classic Sweatshirt and Hoodie. Made from soft fleece with a modern fit and premium print surface, now featuring a fully covered front zipper for extra comfort and flexibility. Durable cotton-blend with 100% cotton surface; available in 10 colours; unisex style - great fit for men & women; classic, regular shape. High-quality SBS zipper in center front, fully covered; tone-on-tone neck tape; half-moon in centre back for customisation; Woven Size Label in Neckline; Tear-away Care Label in Side Seam; matching hoodie available; elastic cuffs and waistband; thick round drawcord with closed metal tips and matching eyelets; double fabric hood with tone-on-tone drawcord.
